title: picea abies var. columnaris
intro: Picea abies var. columnaris, also known as Norway Spruce Columnar, is a cultivar of the Norway Spruce tree (Picea abies), characterized by its narrow, columnar shape and dense foliage. The essential oil extracted from the needles of this plant is rich in alpha-pinene, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Picea abies var. columnaris include its ability to reduce stress, promote respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
